name: libdata-validate-domain-perl
title: libdata-validate-domain-perl
description:
perl domain name validation functions
Data::Validate::Domain collects domain validation routines to make input
validation and untainting easier and more readable.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libdata-validate-domain-perl because perl domain name validation functions.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libdata-validate-domain-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libdata-validate-domain-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libdata-validate-domain-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
